ABOUT US

ENGINEERING EXCELLENCE
SINCE 1998

We give solutions and services mainly in the field of environment and all types of pollution control. We provide consultancy for entire gamut of Environmental Management System. We undertake turnkey projects consisting of engineering design, manufacturing, installation, commissioning, troubleshooting and training of all types of raw water, domestic and industrial wastewater treatment, air pollution control and solid waste management systems.

Since our inception, we have been following ethical business principles. Our commitment for excellence and passion for quality products and services have shown us the way to growth and prosperity.

OUR PRODUCTS

ZLD AND MVRS SYSTEMS
FOR INDUSTRIAL WASTEWATER

Patented non-thermal evaporation technology with the world's lowest CAPEX & OPEX. No heat input required.

ZLD

ZERO DISCHARGE SYSTEM

OPEX: Rs. 180–200 / KLPayback: < 8 months

Non-thermal diffusional evaporation. No steam or heat input. Treats RO reject and high TDS effluent at a fraction of MEE cost.

Learn about Zero Discharge SystemRequest Quote
ZLD

LOW TDS EVAPORATION SYSTEM

OPEX: Rs. 180–200 / KLIoT Enabled

Zero or low maintenance ZLD system for treatment of low TDS RO reject by natural evaporation without heat. IoT monitoring included.

Learn about Low TDS EvaporationRequest Quote
ZLD

RO REJECT SYSTEM

TDS: up to 100K-82% vs MEE OPEX

Complete treatment for high TDS RO reject water. Patented ATM nozzle handles 14%+ solids with zero clogging. SS316L construction.

Learn about RO Reject TreatmentRequest Quote
MVRS

HIGH TDS EVAPORATION (MVRS)

-69% CAPEX vs MEE-61% CO₂ Footprint

MVRS-based high TDS evaporation system. Handles the most challenging industrial effluent — chemical, pharma, textile, food processing.

Learn about High TDS EvaporationRequest Quote
MVRS

HIGH CONCENTRATION SYSTEM

Solids: up to 14%+SS316L Parts

Specialized system for high concentration, high salinity industrial effluent. Extreme durability with adjustable flow and real-time droplet control.

Learn about High Concentration SystemRequest Quote

We offer complete industrial water management services, from collection to recycling.

We help business owners adopt sustainable and environmentally responsible recycling practices.

Our Solution
EVAPORATION SCIENCE

KEY FACTORS THAT DRIVE
REAL-WORLD EVAPORATION

A modern, engineered approach to maximizing evaporation efficiency for high TDS and RO reject streams.

Temperature & Humidity

As temperature rises, each cubic meter of air can hold more water vapor. We design for climatic variation and seasonal performance stability.

Air Flow Requirement

Evaporation needs volume and movement of air. Our systems optimize air-water interaction to maintain throughput under variable site conditions.

Surface Area Engineering

Controlled droplet generation increases effective surface area, accelerating evaporation while preserving drift control and operational safety.

Oversaturation & Drift Control

When air nears saturation, carryover risk rises. We use nozzle, flow, and orientation control strategies to limit drift and improve capture.

WE ARE COMMITTED TO SAVING WATER
175,300,600

Litres of RO reject / high TDS / leachate water evaporated so far (1998–2023).

ATM ADVANTAGES

ASIATIC NON-THERMAL ATM'S
ENGINEERED BENEFITS

Control Droplet Size

Adjust droplet size in real-time through ball valve control for site-specific optimization.

Adjustable Flow

Fine-tune flow rates without nozzle replacement, reducing downtime and operating effort.

Extreme Durability

Built to handle aggressive and high TDS streams with robust, long-life components.

Drift Control

Designed to limit carryover and keep evaporation performance stable in changing wind conditions.

Easy Maintenance

Accessible architecture minimizes manpower requirement and simplifies preventive care.

Specialized Coatings

SS316L working parts and protective material strategy improve corrosion resistance.
